summary: G6 review + promotion: review_dossiers.py, promote_dossiers.py, embed_summaries, children_hash
description: review_dossiers: stratified sample (review_k), shows stage INPUT (GROUND/LEAK checkable), rubric codes, --bulk-accept per field+version. promote_dossiers: require accepted summary/context/all-structure (unless degenerate); manual rows preferred; structure_json span-ordered with chunk_ids; themes from EXPRESSES (floor <5 -> []); summary_nodes L1+L2 with normative children_hash (sha256 of newline-joined per-chunk body sha256s, sorted by id). embed_summaries -> summary_embeddings 768d. Done: tests/test_promote.py (assembly order, manual preference, themes floor, hash stability + flip).

resolution.note: review_dossiers.py (sample/show-with-stage-input/accept/reject-with-rubric-code/bulk-accept/status), promote_dossiers.py (required-fields gate, manual-row preference, span-ordered structure_json with chunk_ids, themes derived with runtime TIER_WEIGHTS + <5 floor, normative children_hash), embed_summaries.py (reuses embed_corpus providers). E2E proven: pilot works promoted (2/52 coverage reported), 10 summary_nodes embedded 768d. 6/6 tests.
